headline: Is TransUnion’s (TRU) New Marketing Chief Subtly Reframing Its Data‑Driven Growth Story?
summary: Earlier this month, TransUnion appointed Clayton Ruebensaal as Chief Marketing and Communications Officer, a new role overseeing Corporate Marketing, Product Marketing, and Corporate Affairs and Communications, reporting directly to President and CEO Chris Cartwright and joining the executive leadership team. Ruebensaal brings extensive experience repositioning global brands and integrating data-driven marketing at companies such as Comcast, American Express, and The Ritz-Carlton, which...
